prerequisites.value: Int 13; Wis 13; Combat Expertise; Perfect Style; base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Perfect Style, you can use your Wisdom modifier in place of your Charisma modifier when attempting Bluff checks to feint. You can spend 1 ki point as a swift action to gain the benefits of Improved Feint for 1 round. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 2 stamina points instead of 1 ki point when using Unblinking Flame Feint.
